name: Disaster Blaster
short_description: Disaster Blaster is a roguelite automation card game where you play a questionably sane scientist building the most over-the-top weapon in the universe. Design your blaster’s shooting mechanism and let it rip against hordes of alien enemies across a galaxy of unfortunate planets.
detailed_description:
Just Updated

Put your skills to the test with focused missions: each challenge requires you to use 3 specific cards. Complete them to unlock exclusive new cards and earn dedicated achievements. Every challenge is a new strategic puzzle — and another chance to blow everything up!


About the Game

Disaster Blaster is a roguelite automation card game where you play a questionably sane scientist building the most over-the-top weapon in the universe. Design your blaster’s shooting mechanism and let it rip against hordes of alien enemies across a galaxy of unfortunate planets.

New Features from Updates

  • Streamer mode
    Streamer Mode (Beta) is a brand-new game mode that lets you connect Disaster Blaster directly to your stream, turning your audience into an active part of the chaos. Viewers can interact with the game through chat and other stream events, influencing gameplay in all sorts of unpredictable ways.

    Streamer Mode (Beta) supports both Twitch and TikTok Live!

  • Pin system

    Want more control over your build? The pin system lets you secure up to 3 key cards, increasing the chance they'll appear during your run. Perfect for setting up devastating combos right from the start!

Build your blaster...

Add and swap cards in your weapon as their effects are applied in sequence to the next shot. Boost the damage, increase shooting speed, turn bullets into incendiary and bouncing projectiles! Make incredible combos and watch your creation evolve and transform into an indomitable force!

...Destroy everything else

Test your weapon in a virtual conquest mission led by an alien who will face endless waves of enemies until the entire planet is destroyed.

Discover new planets and alien species

Discover new planets and face quirky native alien species, each with unique abilities. Unlock them as new characters you can use to test your weapons in future runs, harnessing their powers for even more dynamic gameplay.

Unlock new cards

Unlock dozens of new cards for your weapon and combine them with alien abilities to maximize your offensive potential and create crazy synergies.

Fast-paced and varied

Enjoy intense 10-minute matches with tons of customization possibilities. Each game is a different experience!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Simplified Chinese
